title: adhatoda sphaerosperma
intro: Adhatoda sphaerosperma, also known as Vasa or Malabar nut, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Adhatoda sphaerosperma include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Adhatoda sphaerosperma is often prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and its leaves can be dried or powdered for further use in traditional medicine.
